title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM B-031.13, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5135 / 52 OG No. 8, 3906 (July 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1494, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM B-031.13, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item B-031.13, Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"B-031.13: GR: 40: 20: 10: 10: -: -: -:

b

20: -: 1: -: -

Construction

of a road

connecting

Macanlig and

Puntod to Pinamalayan-

Lumangbayan

Road"

Pinamalayan-

Lumangbayan

Road Junction

Macanlig

Puntod

(3 Kms.),

Construction

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
